title: Argentinian Roast Chicken with Roasted Wings
description: A classic Argentinian dish featuring roasted chicken and wings seasoned with herbs and spices. This recipe is perfect for a family dinner or special occasion.
instructions: Rinse the chicken and pat it dry with paper towels.
Season the chicken with salt, pepper, and chopped parsley.
Heat the olive oil in a large oven-safe skillet over medium-high heat.
Sear the chicken on both sides until browned, about 5 minutes.
Transfer the skillet to the preheated oven and roast the chicken for 30-40 minutes, or until it reaches an internal temperature of 165°F (74°C).
Meanwhile, grill or roast the wings according to your preference.
Once the chicken is cooked, let it rest for 10 minutes before slicing.
Serve the sliced chicken with the roasted wings and garnish with chopped parsley.
